creator: green@unixhelp.org
text:
The port in ports/net/licq is broken; if you attempt to make it, the distribution file is not there to download.

Fix: I've updated the port, I'd appreciate for someone to update it in the repository (this is pretty much a complete overhaul, and has been portlinted and checks out fine, btw):
How-To-Repeat: 
	cd /usr/ports/net/licq; make
